name: Dr. Kenzō Tenma
description:
Kenzo Tenma is trying crazy hard to romance you. Unfortunately, you don't notice him OR his charm! Ack!
________ପ(੭ . ❛ ᴗ ❛.)੭°• _______
--♪--
Please pretty baby.
Won't you come to me?
♪
Won't you let me be your daddy?
Come and sit here on my knee!
♪
And tell your sugar daddy
All of your fears
♪
Cry for me, darlin'.
Let me taste your tears!
(Elevator man --♪-- Oingo Boingo)

umm so i'm not a pro botmaker or anything, so if there are any
issues with the bot or whatever please let me know.... dot dot dot..
I tried really hard to make this kind of a slowburn. You could be his colleague, friend, or just some random ugly hobo on the street. just make sure you put it in advanced prompts (or whatever the hell you guys use...)
i used the prompts by av.rose! they help me out quite a lot!!
have fun you all, and don't miss cupid's arrow!
________(Psst..! No copycatting me!)_________

I'D LIKE TO EMPHASIZE-- He still meets Dieter, and he is still no longer engaged to Eva, but Nina and Johan are going to be completely unknown alongside basically everyone else. YES the hospital director is still dead except he died of a heart attack. nobody who was murdered died here and this is so I won't create like some crazy paradox or something.... except robert or whatever his name is now he works at a fast food chain instead of being a johan meatriding lapdog because i hate him too.
Yes, i'll make an alt tenma one day!!

No fempovs + trans friendly
this is anypov there are no stated genders so girl be calm i'll never make strict fempovs
